+{

+  "mission": {
+    "title": "longhorn: [FEATURE] Add support for ReadWriteOncePod access mode",
+    "description": "[FEATURE] Add support for ReadWriteOncePod access mode. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current longhorn deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your longhorn version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn
helm list -n longhorn 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working longhorn installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review longhorn configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant longhorn configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn
kubectl get configmap -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=longhorn
```
## Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe (👍 if you like this request)

ReadWriteOncePod is another Kubernetes access mode that restricts access to just a single pod on a single node at any given time."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [FEATURE] Add support for ReadWriteOncePod access mode",
+        "description": "## Pre Ready-For-Testing Checklist

The reproduce steps/test steps are at:

The workaround is at:

The PR for the YAML change is at:
The PR for the chart change is at:

The PR is at

Area
Issues

The LEP PR is at

The UI issue/PR is at

The documentation issue/PR is at

The automation skeleton PR
```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: PersistentVolumeClaim
metadata:
  name: vol1
  namespace: default
spec:
  accessModes:
    - ReadWriteOncePod
  storageClassName: longhorn
  resources:
    requests:
      storage: 2Gi
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n longhorn -l app.kubernetes.io/name=longhorn
kubectl get events -n longhorn --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[FEATURE] Add support for ReadWriteOncePod access mode" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
